title: Everbuild KOS Fire Cement Cartridge, Buff, 300 ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Easy to Use: Trowel applied, pre-mixed cement is ready to use for making repairs to fire bricks, fire gates and fuel ovens.
Heat Resistant: Resilient to temperatures up to 1250°C, providing an excellent heat resistant seal for areas exposed to temperature extremes.
Excellent Adhesion Properties: Has good adhesive properties adhering to fire bricks, blockwork, stone and clayware.
Domestic & Commercial Use: Suitable for use in both domestic and commercial environments, filling, fixing and sealing fire bricks, flue pipes, fireplaces and much more.
Available in 500g, 1kg, 2kg, 6kg, 12.5kg and 25kg. Cartridge also available.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? All surfaces must be clean, free from dust, grease and other contamination. Wet all surfaces to give a good key. Use straight from tub. Soften with a small amount of water if required. Work well into the joints. After applying, gradually increase heat over a 4 hours period. Make good any cracks which may form with fresh cement to form a smoke-tight seal. Always moisten surfaces prior to applying. Always apply heat gradually. Product is not waterproof! Firespan Intumescent Pads Fire Mate Sealant KOS Flue Cement Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 3.8 out of 5 stars 49 4.3 out of 5 stars 33 4.3 out of 5 stars 134 Price £145.28 £ 145 . 28 — no data — no data Designed for use on the inside and outside of electrical socket boxes to maintain fire and smoke barriers. Excellent intumescing temperature up to 250°C. An intumescent acrylic sealant that swells when exposed to temperatures in excess of 125°C to prevent the passage of fire and smoke. Fireproof mortar paste, designed for the safe installation and jointing of concrete flue liners for domestic fires and stoves. Resistant to temperature extremes up to 1250°C.
